intro: The Gentlemen, Payouts King, and BlackCat (ALPHV) were the most active ransomware threat actors in this period, with 29 articles covering their campaigns. Their operations exploited critical vulnerabilities, notably CVE-2026-1731 and CVE-2026-34197, to target a wide range of sectors. Healthcare, logistics, manufacturing, and retail organizations across Europe, the United States, Turkey, and France were impacted. The reporting from April 12 to April 22, 2026, detailed a severity mix dominated by high-severity incidents, reflecting a concentrated wave of ransomware activity against global infrastructure.
